matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: Tandem affinity purification (TAP) was carried out as described previously. Briefly, S-protein-2xFLAG-Streptavidin binding peptide (SFB)-tagged TLK1, SFB-TLK1 1–240, SFB-TLK1 D607A, SFB-TLK1 133–208, SFB-TLK1 13-208 Y149A F150A or SFB-TLK2 were transfected into HEK293T cells.
Tandem affinity purification of HEK 293T cells transiently expressing SFB-TLK1 133-208 or SFB-TLK1 133-208 Y149A F150A to identify if TLK1 PIP box mutants can still interact with PCNA.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Permanent loss of function through full gene knockout (for example CRISPR KO or deletion).
evidence: HEK293T cells were transfected with either SFB-TLK1, SFB-TLK2, siRNA targeting TLK1, TLK2, or TLK1 and TLK2.
S-protein-2xFLAG-Streptavidin binding peptide (SFB)-tagged TLK1 133-208... were transfected into 2x, 15 cm plates of HEK293T cells.
Cells were harvested 48 hours after transfection
S-protein-2xFLAG-Streptavidin binding peptide (SFB)-tagged... SFB-TLK1 133-208 Y149A F150A were transfected into 2x, 15 cm plates of HEK293T cells.
Cells were harvested 48 hours after transfection
HEK293T cells were transfected with... siRNA targeting TLK1, TLK2, or TLK1 and TLK2. Cells were harvested 24 h after transfection

replicate_hints: four replicates of each transfected or control non-transfected cells

evidence: Tandem affinity purification of HEK 293T cells transiently expressing SFB-TLK1 133-208 or SFB-TLK1 133-208 Y149A F150A to identify if TLK1 PIP box mutants can still interact with PCNA.
HEK293T cells were transfected with either SFB-TLK1, SFB-TLK2, siRNA targeting TLK1, TLK2, or TLK1 and TLK2... four replicates of each transfected or control non-transfected cells

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses Data-Dependent Acquisition (DDA) on an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid, standard trypsin digestion, and identifies proteins via Mascot/Scaffold. While TMT is mentioned in a separate phosphoproteomics section, the PRIDE metadata for PXD048215 specifically describes TAP-MS for TLK1 fragments without isobaric labeling.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The text describes a separate TMT11plex phosphopeptide analysis using High-Select TiO2 enrichment and MS3 acquisition.
